_README: Template for the 31-instance mesh deployment. Each entry maps one Vast.ai instance → one mesh agent identity. The deploy script (Deploy-MeshAgents.ps1) joins this with the live `vastai show instances` listing to produce per-instance env files. Order matters — entries assigned to instances in the order Vast.ai returns them. Provider mix: Anthropic-backed agents are richest but rate-limited + costly; local-llm agents run on the GPU itself for $0 LLM cost (just compute burn). Mock agents validate the runtime without LLM cost.
_provisioning_status: TEMPLATE — wallet + x402 bearer fields are placeholders. Founder must: (1) provision N x402 seats on the HoloMesh team-board, (2) generate N wallets, (3) substitute placeholders below. Per F.027/F.002: x402 seat creation is founder authority; agent must NOT auto-provision.

agents._role: H200 powerhouse — runs Qwen 72B-AWQ locally on 140GB HBM3e. Founder directive 2026-04-26: switched from Anthropic-backed Claude to local-llm because Anthropic API spend ran $21+ in <2h with 0 CAEL records produced (mw01 wedged in over-budget loop pre-cap-removal, then hit 'credit balance too low' post-restart). Local 72B at this tier produces production-grade reasoning + coding output (per gpu-tier-models.json) at $0 per-token cost — only the Vast hourly rental ($91/d). Supervisor-style coordination still works; just costs less.
agents._sidecar_note: AMBER §7.2 example: Goedel-V2-7B Lean-specialist sidecar co-located on H200 (88GB total fits in 140GB HBM3e per §7.1). Schema is parsed + validated by deploy.py today (run `python deploy.py --validate-only --config <this>` to confirm). EXECUTION PATH (screen -dmS startup, health-check, runtime dispatch heuristic) is NOT YET WIRED in deploy_one — gated on live-fleet validation per F.031. Next agent flips wiring after task_1777238593020_7bvu step 2 lands a fresh H200.

agents._role: Local-LLM — Qwen 0.5B running directly on the GPU. Zero LLM API cost; pure compute burn. Brain: trait-inference. Best for the trait-inference work that's already speced.
Local-LLM — Qwen 0.5B for security-auditor work. The full mesh becomes a multi-domain agent fleet.
MOCK provider — validates the runtime + identity + commit-hook flow with $0 LLM cost. First N=5 of these on the cheapest instances let us catch wiring issues before paying for real LLM tokens.

_brain_distribution_plan.lean-theorist-brain.hsplus: 1 instance (H200 flagship — anthropic-backed for paper-22+23 proof work)
_brain_distribution_plan.security-auditor-brain.hsplus: 5 instances (paper-21 attack surface enumeration + threat-model expansion)
_brain_distribution_plan.trait-inference-brain.hsplus: 10 instances (paper-19 dataset generation — local-llm Brittney synth)
_brain_distribution_plan.sesl-training-brain.hsplus: 5 instances (paper-17 self-play harness exploration; mock or local-llm)

_deployment_sequence: 1. Founder provisions 31 x402 seats on team_1775935947314_f0noxi via /admin POST /seats
2. Founder generates 31 wallet keypairs (locally; never commits private keys per F.001/F.002)
3. Founder fills in HOLOSCRIPT_AGENT_WALLET_<HANDLE> + HOLOSCRIPT_AGENT_X402_BEARER_<HANDLE> in .env (gitignored per F.001)
5. Each instance: bootstrap.sh installs node + clones + builds + runs whoami pre-flight + starts daemon
6. Verify via /room: 31 new agents appear in /presence + start claiming tasks from /board
7. Monitor burn rate vs work-completed via team done-log; tear down underperformers
